calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-05-2024 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-25-2024 Continued To Jul-03-24 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Schedule Default Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar May-17-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, being set for hearing on Plaintiff's request for entry of default judgment.

Dept. 505; Judge Maria Evangelista; Clerk N Webb; Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 10:37 am and concluding at 10:59 am.

Plaintiff 100 California Street LLC is present represented by Peter Griffin Esq. via zoom video conference.
Defendant Ellamia 100 Claifornia LLC not appearing.

Plaintiff presents summary of facts, claims and an offer of proof.

STACY SPURR is sworn to testify on behalf of the plantiff and testifies.

The matter is submitted.

By the statements made by Plaintiff and its counsel, documents filed, and evidence presented, the Court finds that Plaintiff has provided sufficient evidence proving each element of the complaint.

Good cause appearing, the Court RULES in favor of Plaintiff 100 California Street LLC, and against Defendant Ellamia 100 Claifornia LLC, as follows:

1. Damages: $1,559,314.17
2. Prejudgment Interest: $140,338.28
3. Costs: $1,417.55
4. Attorney Fees: 22,562.55

TOTAL JUDGMENT: $1,723,632.54

Proposed judgment signed and filed.(D505)

MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, being set for hearing on Plaintiff's request for entry of default judgment.

Dept. 505; Judge Maria Evangelista; Clerk N Webb; Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 10:41 am and concluding at 11:04 am.

Plaintiff 100 California Streeet, LLC. is represented by Peter Griffin, Esq. via zoom video conference.
Defendant Ellamia 100 California, LLC. is not present.

Plaintiff presents summary of facts, claims and an offer of proof.

STACEY SPURR is sworn to testify on behalf of Plaintiff and testifies.

Plaintiff 100 California Streeet, LLC. submits the following exhibits for the Court's review:
Exhibit 1: Declaration of Stacey Spurr and Exhibts attached

The Court orders the matter continued to January 12, 2024 at 9:00 am in Dept 505, to allow Plaintiff time to provide points and authorities. (D505)
